MASTER CALENDAR JURY

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Jacqueline Baker, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff John Stewart Co.
Francisco Torres representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Kevin Wallace is present.
Jaime Rush representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 51 Sixth Street #514, San Francisco, California.

This case settled, the trial date of March 17, 2008 is vacated.
